description_long: This object is a sleek, angular airplane with a distinctive stealth-inspired design, featuring sharply swept wings that form a triangular, almost delta-like planform. The surface is uniformly dark, likely matte black, with minimal visible markings or windows, emphasizing a low-observable profile. The fuselage is integrated smoothly into the wing structure, giving it a blended, flying-wing appearance with no visible tail or vertical stabilizer. The nose is sharply pointed, and the cockpit area is subtly defined, appearing as a small, darkened canopy near the front center. There are no visible engines, landing gear, or external appendages, suggesting a design focused on aerodynamic efficiency and stealth. The overall form is reminiscent of advanced unmanned aerial vehicles or stealth bombers, optimized for minimal radar signature.
description: A sleek, angular, matte-black airplane with sharply swept wings and a blended, tailless design, resembling a stealth aircraft.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sharply pointed nose, wide angular wings, and a subtle cockpit canopy at the center.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the extremely thin, flat profile and the seamless integration of the fuselage and wings.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the tailless, flying-wing configuration with no visible vertical stabilizer or engine exhausts.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again emphasizes the flat, angular wing structure and the lack of protruding features.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, sharply swept delta configuration with no visible dihedral or anhedral angles; tailless flying wing design.
attribute_engine_type: No visible engines present on the exterior.
attribute_tail_design: Tailless configuration with no vertical or horizontal stabilizers; pure flying wing.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a small, dark canopy integrated into the fuselage.
